prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small green metal cylinder
  - obj_1: small green rubber sphere
  - obj_2: large green rubber sphere
  - obj_3: small yellow metal cylinder
  - obj_4: small red rubber cube
  - obj_5: small green metal sphere
  - obj_6: large yellow metal sphere
  - obj_7: large red rubber sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0081] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0082] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0083] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0085] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0086] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0087] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0088] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0089] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0090] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0091] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0092] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0093] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0094] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0095] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0096] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0097] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0098] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0099] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0100] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
